text_excerpt: Parliamentary activities - Jonathan Davies MP - Jonathan Davies MP Skip to main content Jonathan Davies MP Serving the people of Mid Derbyshire Join Get Involved Donate Home Contact In parliament In the constituency Newsletter Testimonials Frequently Asked Questions Youth Survey Report More Menu Parliamentary activities About my latest work in Westminster The role of an MP is extensive. Most weeks, I spend Monday to Thursday in Westminster doing parliamentary work such as asking questions in debates and scrutinising new legislation line by line. As well as the well-known events like Prime Minister’s Questions, there are plenty of other debates and opportunities for MPs to raise issues on behalf of their constituents and get a response from a minister. Here, you will be able to find what I am doing to ensure that you are better represented.
